title: psychotria ostreophora
intro: Psychotria ostreophora, also known as the 'shell-bearing shrub', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues like coughs and colds. Traditional herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures made from the plant's leaves and stems, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
